tier_1_top_performers.name: Nancy Pelosi
tier_1_top_performers.notes: Husband Paul Pelosi trades. Historically strong tech/semiconductor timing. NVDA, AAPL, GOOGL, CRM, RBLX calls ahead of legislation. Most-watched congressional trader.

tier_1_top_performers.name: Ro Khanna
tier_1_top_performers.notes: MOST ACTIVE TRADER IN CONGRESS — 4,081 trades in 2025. Silicon Valley representative, tech sector focus. Discloses constantly.

tier_1_top_performers.name: Josh Gottheimer
tier_1_top_performers.notes: $44M in disclosed trades in 2025. Financial Services Committee. High volume, finance sector focus.
tier_1_top_performers.disclosure_activity: Very active — hundreds of trades per year

tier_1_top_performers.name: Michael McCaul
tier_1_top_performers.notes: $75M+ in disclosed trades in 2025. Foreign Affairs Committee chair. Defense and semiconductor trades.

tier_1_top_performers.name: Warren Davidson
tier_1_top_performers.notes: Top-performing congressional trader of 2025 with 78.8% returns. Financial Services Committee.
tier_1_top_performers.disclosure_activity: Active — best returns of any congressional trader

tier_2_active_traders.name: Gil Cisneros
tier_2_active_traders.notes: Former lottery winner. Active trader with large position sizes. Armed Services Committee.

tier_2_active_traders.name: Tommy Tuberville
tier_2_active_traders.notes: High volume Senate trader. Defense and finance lean. Armed Services Committee.

tier_2_active_traders.name: Dan Crenshaw
tier_2_active_traders.notes: Energy and defense focus. Trades align with committee knowledge. Consistent outperformance.

tier_2_active_traders.name: Markwayne Mullin
tier_2_active_traders.notes: 71 trades and $4.4M volume in early 2025. Active senator trader.
tier_2_active_traders.disclosure_activity: Active — high frequency for a senator

tier_2_active_traders.name: Richard Blumenthal
tier_2_active_traders.notes: LED ALL OF CONGRESS by trading volume in 2025 with ~$80M in transactions. Hundreds of trades.
tier_2_active_traders.disclosure_activity: Extremely active — top by dollar volume

tier_2_active_traders.name: David Taylor
tier_2_active_traders.notes: Freshman congressman, emerged as one of biggest traders. 132 trades in first 14 months, 59 in 2026 alone.

tier_3_watchlist.name: Donald Norcross
tier_3_watchlist.notes: 70.8% returns in 2025 — second-best performer in Congress.

tier_3_watchlist.name: Mark Green
tier_3_watchlist.notes: Homeland Security Committee chair. Defense and cyber trades.

sectors.description: Sectors to categorize trades into for clustering analysis.
